description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a mix of light and dark materials, including large glass windows and smooth wall surfaces. The house is set on a paved lot with a swimming pool, a small garden area, and an outdoor patio furnished with lounge chairs and an umbrella. There is a driveway with a parked car and a circular water tank adjacent to the building. The upper floor includes a rooftop terrace with outdoor seating and greenery, while the ground floor has expansive windows and a shaded entryway. The landscaping includes a palm tree, shrubs, and a manicured lawn, creating a contemporary urban residence.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terrace, pool, and landscaped yard, featuring minimalist design elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main facade with large windows, a shaded entryway, and a glimpse of the rooftop terrace and garden.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, pool, patio with lounge chairs, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the driveway, parked car, circular water tank, and the rear garden area.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the driveway, water tank, car, and a clear view of the rooftop terrace and upper-level windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a large glass door, shaded overhang, and paved steps leading to the entrance
